---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, integration, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

What would you like to add or change?

## Use Case

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? If it's a new MCP tool category, describe the tools.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.
